_comment: Capability matrix for every NLE backend. The editing brain reads this to decide what a backend can do and degrade gracefully. Facts verified May 2026 (DaVinci Resolve scripting docs, Blackmagic forum, opentimelineio adapters).

premiere.notes: Driven via the CEP panel + ExtendScript bridge in this repo. No official desktop automation API; CEP PlayerDebugMode is enough for dev/personal use. Export via Adobe Media Encoder.

resolve.notes: Official Python/Lua scripting API. EXTERNAL scripting (what an MCP server needs) requires Resolve Studio; the free version restricts scripting to the internal console (since 19.1 UIManager GUIs are Studio-only too). Resolve 20's AI tools are mostly NOT exposed to the scripting API. Imports .otio natively via MediaPool.ImportTimelineFromFile. Requires Preferences > System > General > 'External scripting using' = Local/Network. fusionscript binds CPython ~3.9-3.13 (not 3.14). Verified end-to-end on Resolve Studio 21 Public Beta, macOS, Python 3.9/3.11/3.13.

fcpxml.notes: No live scripting API. Integration is FCPXML file exchange: generate/ingest a project file, the human opens it in Final Cut and exports. opentimelineio ships an fcpx_xml adapter.
